reason: No irreplaceable CEO lever: the top ask is a CFO/budget-signatory exec-connect (v4 rules count reaching a buyer CFO as senior, NOT CEO, intervention), carried by the CRO/regional MD Carl Kimball who already gatekeeps all ME meetings; the S/4HANA integration proof is a presales/SE written deliverable (due 10 Jul), and champion-building plus KPMG/Accenture revised quotes are delegated field execution. Buyer target is a CFO, not a peer CEO/board, so no CEO-to-CEO relationship is required.
